scenarios.capability: Fix markdownlint violations in a document with multiple rule failures
scenarios.reason: Agent can produce a corrected Markdown file with all violations resolved without suppressing rules globally.

scenarios.capability: Author a well-structured README from scratch following the skill's document-type template and heading hierarchy rules
scenarios.reason: Agent can produce a complete README.md file that follows proper heading sequence and has typed code fences.

scenarios.capability: Add explicit language tags to all untagged fenced code blocks in an existing document
scenarios.reason: Agent can locate every untagged fence in a supplied document and add appropriate language identifiers.

scenarios.capability: Write a markdownlint config file that enforces the skill's style rules
scenarios.reason: Agent can produce a `.markdownlint.json` configuration that encodes the anti-patterns from the skill as enforced rules.
